summary: Unwrap the standard Printing Press envelope after json.Unmarshal succeeds instead of trying it in an unreachable fallback.
reason: json.Unmarshal into map[string]any succeeds for both flat objects and envelope objects, so the original `if err != nil` fallback was unreachable. An envelope response left raw holding {results:...,meta:...} and pickRegistration scanned the wrong layer, always returning ErrNoRegistration.
